## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content strategy and website improvements for Ambient's marketing efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/cpujE3zz86bzX9T27dMWWHqG3Q83-9Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Ambient needs a comprehensive content strategy focusing on SEO, lead generation, and positioning as industry leaders](https://fathom.video/share/cpujE3zz86bzX9T27dMWWHqG3Q83-9Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
  - [Website redesign planned with migration to Webflow, offering opportunity for significant improvements](https://fathom.video/share/cpujE3zz86bzX9T27dMWWHqG3Q83-9Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=2194.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide detailed recommendations for website optimization and content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/cpujE3zz86bzX9T27dMWWHqG3Q83-9Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
  - [Potential development of an industry-focused portal to establish thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/cpujE3zz86bzX9T27dMWWHqG3Q83-9Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=2510.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Overview

  - [Goal: Increase inbound pipeline, build category authority in AI physical security](https://fathom.video/share/cpujE3zz86bzX9T27dMWWHqG3Q83-9Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
  - [Two-pronged approach: competitor gap analysis and pain point-based keyword research](https://fathom.video/share/cpujE3zz86bzX9T27dMWWHqG3Q83-9Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)
  - [Focus on creating themed campaigns with multiple content types (blog, landing page, email, ads, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/cpujE3zz86bzX9T27dMWWHqG3Q83-9Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)
  - [Prioritize top-of-funnel content initially due to current lack of SEO-optimized material](https://fathom.video/share/cpujE3zz86bzX9T27dMWWHqG3Q83-9Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)

### Website Redesign and Optimization

  - [Migrating from Strapi to Webflow CMS](https://fathom.video/share/cpujE3zz86bzX9T27dMWWHqG3Q83-9Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=918.0)
  - [Need for composable CTAs and improved user experience](https://fathom.video/share/cpujE3zz86bzX9T27dMWWHqG3Q83-9Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)
  - [Opportunity to implement best practices for modern websites](https://fathom.video/share/cpujE3zz86bzX9T27dMWWHqG3Q83-9Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=2167.0)
  - [Lightweight branding exercise to be conducted with web agency (SVZ)](https://fathom.video/share/cpujE3zz86bzX9T27dMWWHqG3Q83-9Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=2422.0)

### Content Production Process

  - [Using Atlas platform for content generation](https://fathom.video/share/cpujE3zz86bzX9T27dMWWHqG3Q83-9Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [Workflow includes brief generation, research, outline, draft, fact-checking, and meta tags](https://fathom.video/share/cpujE3zz86bzX9T27dMWWHqG3Q83-9Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [Potential for automation with Strapi CMS integration](https://fathom.video/share/cpujE3zz86bzX9T27dMWWHqG3Q83-9Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)

### SEO and Competitive Landscape

  - [Competitors like ZeroEyes have strong SEO presence](https://fathom.video/share/cpujE3zz86bzX9T27dMWWHqG3Q83-9Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)
  - [Opportunity to target both competitive and unique keywords](https://fathom.video/share/cpujE3zz86bzX9T27dMWWHqG3Q83-9Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)
  - [Need to balance SEO priorities with company's vertical/use case priorities](https://fathom.video/share/cpujE3zz86bzX9T27dMWWHqG3Q83-9Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)

### Thought Leadership Portal

  - [Concept of creating a comprehensive physical security resource](https://fathom.video/share/cpujE3zz86bzX9T27dMWWHqG3Q83-9Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=2510.0)
  - [Could include glossary, vendor evaluations, and industry insights](https://fathom.video/share/cpujE3zz86bzX9T27dMWWHqG3Q83-9Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=2544.0)
  - [Potential for AI-driven content generation at scale](https://fathom.video/share/cpujE3zz86bzX9T27dMWWHqG3Q83-9Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=2557.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to provide list of modern website best practices and recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/cpujE3zz86bzX9T27dMWWHqG3Q83-9Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
  - [Ambient to share messaging document and feature function table](https://fathom.video/share/cpujE3zz86bzX9T27dMWWHqG3Q83-9Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
  - [Discuss timeline and resource allocation for thought leadership portal development](https://fathom.video/share/cpujE3zz86bzX9T27dMWWHqG3Q83-9Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=2615.0)
  - [GrowthX to review and incorporate new brand guidelines when available](https://fathom.video/share/cpujE3zz86bzX9T27dMWWHqG3Q83-9Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=2338.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up to define specific use cases and industries for content focus](https://fathom.video/share/cpujE3zz86bzX9T27dMWWHqG3Q83-9Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
